title: alchemilla vulgaris var. trunciloba
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. trunciloba, also known as Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a variety of the Lady's Mantle plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Alchemilla vulgaris var. trunciloba can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
